/usr/bin/cc  --coverage -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g  --coverage CMakeFiles/brain_demo.dir/brain_demo.c.o -o brain_demo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin: /home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin/libnimcp.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -llz4 -ljansson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so
